generateLuaWzKey() - Static method in class wzlib.crypto.WzKeyGenerator

generateWzKey(byte[]) - Static method in class wzlib.crypto.WzKeyGenerator

generateWzKey(byte[], byte[]) - Static method in class wzlib.crypto.WzKeyGenerator
從 IV 與自訂 128-byte UserKey 產生 WZ 金鑰。

readBytes(int) - Method in class wzlib.util.WzBinaryReader
 
readCompressedInt() - Method in class wzlib.util.WzBinaryReader
Ported from: WzBinaryReader.ReadCompressedInt() sbyte == MinValue (-128) → read full int32 otherwise sbyte IS the value
readCompressedLong() - Method in class wzlib.util.WzBinaryReader
Ported from: WzBinaryReader.ReadLong() sbyte == MinValue (-128) → read full int64 otherwise sbyte IS the value

readInt16() - Method in class wzlib.util.WzBinaryReader
 
readInt32() - Method in class wzlib.util.WzBinaryReader
 
readInt64() - Method in class wzlib.util.WzBinaryReader
 
readNullTerminatedString() - Method in class wzlib.util.WzBinaryReader
Read null-terminated string (UTF-8).
readOffset() - Method in class wzlib.util.WzBinaryReader
Read encrypted offset.
readSByte() - Method in class wzlib.util.WzBinaryReader
Read signed byte (sbyte in C#)
readSingle() - Method in class wzlib.util.WzBinaryReader
 
readString() - Method in class wzlib.util.WzBinaryReader
Read WZ encrypted string.
readString(int) - Method in class wzlib.util.WzBinaryReader
Read an ASCII string of fixed length, without decryption.
readStringAtOffset(long) - Method in class wzlib.util.WzBinaryReader
Read string at a specific offset, then restore position.
readStringAtOffset(long, boolean) - Method in class wzlib.util.WzBinaryReader
 
readStringBlock(long) - Method in class wzlib.util.WzBinaryReader
Read string block (inline or offset reference).
readUInt16() - Method in class wzlib.util.WzBinaryReader
Read unsigned short (ushort in C#)
readUInt32() - Method in class wzlib.util.WzBinaryReader
Read unsigned int (uint in C#), returned as long
recalculateFileStart() - Method in class wzlib.WzHeader
Recalculate FStart based on header content size.
resetActiveUserKey() - Static method in class wzlib.crypto.WzCryptoConstants
重設為預設 MapleStory UserKey。

Rollback stream position by byOffset bytes.
rotateLeft(long, byte) - Static method in class wzlib.util.WzTool

rotateRight(long, byte) - Static method in class wzlib.util.WzTool

writeWzObjectValue(String, byte) - Method in class wzlib.util.WzBinaryWriter

WZ_BMSCLASSIC - Static variable in class wzlib.crypto.WzCryptoConstants
IV for BMS/Classic (no encryption)
WZ_GMSIV - Static variable in class wzlib.crypto.WzCryptoConstants
IV for GMS
WZ_HEADER - Static variable in class wzlib.util.WzTool
"PKG1" as int representation (little-endian)
WZ_IMAGE_HEADER_BYTE_WITH_OFFSET - Static variable in class wzlib.WzImage
Header byte for image with offset
WZ_IMAGE_HEADER_BYTE_WITHOUT_OFFSET - Static variable in class wzlib.WzImage
Header byte for standard image without offset
WZ_MSEAIV - Static variable in class wzlib.crypto.WzCryptoConstants
IV for MSEA/EMS/KMS
WZ_OffsetConstant - Static variable in class wzlib.crypto.WzCryptoConstants
Constant used in WZ offset encryption
WzBinaryProperty - Class in wzlib.property
音效資料。
WzBinaryProperty(String, WzBinaryReader, boolean) - Constructor for class wzlib.property.WzBinaryProperty
 
WzBinaryReader - Class in wzlib.util
Ported from: MapleLib/WzLib/Util/WzBinaryReader.cs Little-endian binary reader with WZ-specific features: - Compressed int/long - Encrypted WZ strings (ASCII + Unicode) - Encrypted offsets - String block reading
WzBinaryReader(byte[], WzMutableKey, long) - Constructor for class wzlib.util.WzBinaryReader
Constructor for memory-based reader (used by createReaderForSection).
WzBinaryReader(File, byte[]) - Constructor for class wzlib.util.WzBinaryReader
Constructor for file-based reader.
WzBinaryReader(File, byte[], long) - Constructor for class wzlib.util.WzBinaryReader
 
WzBinaryWriter - Class in wzlib.util
Ported from: MapleLib/WzLib/Util/WzBinaryWriter.cs Little-endian binary writer with WZ-specific features: - Compressed int/long - Encrypted WZ strings (ASCII + Unicode) - Encrypted offsets - String caching for offset-based references
WzBinaryWriter(OutputStream, byte[]) - Constructor for class wzlib.util.WzBinaryWriter
 
WzBinaryWriter(OutputStream, byte[], boolean) - Constructor for class wzlib.util.WzBinaryWriter
Ported from: WzBinaryWriter(Stream output, byte[] WzIv, bool leaveOpen)
WzBinaryWriter(OutputStream, byte[], long) - Constructor for class wzlib.util.WzBinaryWriter

WZ 加密常數與 AES UserKey 管理。

WzFile - Class in wzlib
WZ 檔案的主要入口。
WzFile(String, byte[]) - Constructor for class wzlib.WzFile
以自定義 IV 開啟（私服用）。
WzFile(String, short, byte[]) - Constructor for class wzlib.WzFile
Open a wz file with a custom IV and known game version (for private servers).
WzFile(String, short, WzMapleVersion) - Constructor for class wzlib.WzFile
以指定版本開啟 .wz。
WzFile(String, WzMapleVersion) - Constructor for class wzlib.WzFile
以自動偵測版本開啟 .wz。

浮點數屬性。

WZ 金鑰產生器，從 IV 與 UserKey 產生 AES 解密金鑰。

wzlib.crypto - package wzlib.crypto
 
wzlib.property - package wzlib.property
 
wzlib.util - package wzlib.util
 
WzListFile - Class in wzlib
List.wz 檔案的解析與寫入工具 — 儲存 WZ 路徑字串清單的特殊格式。
